differences.title: 1. PRIMARY USE CASE
differences.leftDesc: Ideal for complex, data-driven applications with rich user interactions.
differences.rightDesc: Optimized for content-heavy sites like blogs, marketing pages, and docs.

differences.title: 2. RENDERING STRATEGY
differences.leftDesc: Supports Server-Side Rendering and Static Site Generation out-of-the-box.
differences.rightDesc: Primarily SSG with 'Islands Architecture' for interactive components.

differences.title: 3. JAVASCRIPT DEFAULTS
differences.leftDesc: Ships JavaScript by default for client-side interactivity.
differences.rightDesc: Ships zero JS by default, only on demand.

differences.title: 4. FRAMEWORK INTEGRATION
differences.leftDesc: Deeply integrated with React, extending its capabilities.
differences.rightDesc: Supports React, Vue, Svelte, Preact, and more.

differences.title: 5. PERFORMANCE FOCUS
differences.leftDesc: Optimizes app performance with features like code splitting.
differences.rightDesc: Prioritizes initial page load speed through minimal JS.

differences.title: 6. DEVELOPMENT EXPERIENCE
differences.leftDesc: Provides a comprehensive set of features for complex apps.
differences.rightDesc: Offers a streamlined, fast development workflow.

differences.title: 7. ECOSYSTEM & COMMUNITY
differences.leftDesc: Large, established ecosystem and community support.
differences.rightDesc: Rapidly growing community and active development.
